paperTitle: GLaD: Geometric Latent Distillation for Vision-Language-Action Models

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 95 · libero object 97.4 · libero goal 94.4 · libero 10 89.4 | TABLE I | Notes: All 4 standard LIBERO suites evaluated with 50 demos per task training, 50 evaluation episodes per task. Post-trained on LIBERO dataset.

benchmarks.label: LIBERO-Pro
benchmarks.detail: Suites: goal ori 98 · goal obj 81 · goal pos 4 · goal sem 98 · goal task 10 · spatial ori 97 · spatial obj 98 · spatial pos 12 · spatial sem 97 · long ori 94 · long obj 54 · long pos 2 · long sem 93 · long task 9 · object ori 97 · object obj 86 · object pos 3 · object sem 97 · object task 0 | TABLE II | Notes: First-party result from the GLaD (Geometric Latent Distillation) paper. 19 of 20 core cells reported; spatial_task is missing. The displayed score is the arithmetic mean of the 19 reported cells and should be treated as incomplete.
